problem: Find the product of the greatest common divisor and the least common multiple of $18$ and $42.$

classified_questions.question: What is the greatest common divisor (GCD) of 18 and 42?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Can you determine the prime factorizations of 18 and 42?
classified_questions.label: b
